data.content: Implemented the initial Loom CLI surface for knot 562b: added src/cli_loom.rs with loom compat-test args and smoke/matrix/json/keep-artifacts parsing, wired Commands::Loom into src/cli.rs and early dispatch in src/main.rs with a clear placeholder error until the harness lands, added parser coverage plus a main-path integration test, and added a patch changeset required by the repo push guard. Validation passed with cargo test loom_compat_test_dispatches_through_main --test cli_main_paths -- --nocapture and make sanity (including coverage at 95.03% locally; 95.02% on push hook). Branch pushed: codex/562b-cli-scaffolding.
